name: node-pipeline-test
description: A mock Node.js project to test the Local CIRunner

scripts.test: echo 'Running unit tests...' && echo 'Test 1: App mounts -> PASS' && echo 'Test 2: Cache hits -> PASS' && exit 0
scripts.lint: echo 'Running ESLint...' && echo 'WARN: Unused variable in app.js:12' && exit 1
scripts.build: echo 'Building production bundle...' && mkdir -p dist && echo 'function launch(){console.log("ready");}' > dist/bundle.min.js && echo 'Build complete: dist/bundle.min.js'

author: Antigravity
